title: Suggestions to Improve Interface Usability on High-Resolution Screens
excerpt:

posts.author: Gabriellabrowne (Gabriella browne)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’ve been using monday.com extensively for project management and team collaboration, and I really appreciate the flexibility it offers. At the same time, I’ve noticed some areas where the platform could improve, especially when working on larger or high-resolution screens.

For example, on a 4K monitor, UI elements like buttons, icons, and text can appear very small, which makes navigation less efficient. One suggestion is to implement adaptive scaling that adjusts interface elements based on screen resolution. Another idea is to allow users to customize the interface scale to make dashboards and task views more readable and user-friendly.

Small adjustments like these could significantly improve productivity for users with high-resolution displays. I’d love to hear if others have faced similar challenges and any tips or workarounds you’ve discovered.

Looking forward to learning from the community!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great suggestion! I’d recommend putting it on the feature suggestion board Feature requests - monday Community Forum
